name: Amazon Personalize Dataset Group Definition
description: Schema defining the structure of an Amazon Personalize dataset group resource, including datasets, solutions, campaigns, and recommenders for building personalized recommendation systems.

name.description: The name of the dataset group.

datasetGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the dataset group.

status.description: The current status of the dataset group.

domain.description: The domain of the dataset group for domain-based recommenders.

kmsKeyArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the datasets.

roleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that has permissions to access the datasets.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time of the dataset group.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The last updated date and time of the dataset group.

datasets.description: The datasets in the dataset group.

solutions.description: The trained solutions in the dataset group.

campaigns.description: The deployed campaigns for real-time recommendations.

recommenders.description: Domain-based recommenders in the dataset group.

Dataset.description: A dataset containing interaction, user, or item data for training.

datasetGroupArn.description: The ARN of the dataset group.

schemaArn.description: The ARN of the schema associated with the dataset.

Dataset.name: Dataset

Solution.description: A trained model that generates recommendations.

recipeArn.description: The ARN of the recipe used to create the solution.

datasetGroupArn.description: The ARN of the dataset group that provides the training data.

performAutoML.description: Whether to perform automated ML to find the best recipe.

Solution.name: Solution

Campaign.description: A deployed solution version for real-time recommendations.

solutionVersionArn.description: The ARN of the deployed solution version.

minProvisionedTPS.description: The minimum provisioned transactions per second.

Campaign.name: Campaign

Recommender.description: A domain-based recommender for specific use cases.

datasetGroupArn.description: The ARN of the dataset group.

recipeArn.description: The ARN of the recipe for the recommender.

Recommender.name: Recommender
